fields.name: Acme Software
fields.description: A small software company building practical internal tools and web applications.

fields.name: Northwind Services
fields.description: A service company focused on document review, operations support, and hiring workflows.

fields.name: BrightPath Media
fields.description: A media and content team that maintains public-facing web pages and job content.

fields.title: Junior Python Developer
fields.description: Help build and maintain internal Python and Django tools. This is a good role for a developer who understands web basics and wants to grow with a small engineering team.

fields.title: Data Entry Specialist
fields.description: Review incoming documents, enter structured records, and coordinate with hiring managers. Attention to detail and clear communication are important.

fields.title: Web Content Assistant
fields.description: Assist with updating web pages, reviewing job posts, and keeping public-facing content accurate and readable.
